subject: Final notice: account suspension due to unpaid invoice
body: CRITICAL: Final notice before account suspension due to unpaid invoice #9928. Please resolve immediately.

subject: Double charge detected for annual subscription tier
body: URGENT: Duplicate charge detected on my credit card for the annual subscription. This is unacceptable.

subject: Plan downgraded unexpectedly while working
body: My plan was downgraded unexpectedly despite having an active subscription. This is blocking our entire team.

subject: Payment portal failing during plan upgrade
body: Payment failed for the third time this week. I need to update my billing information but the portal is slow.

subject: Invoice discrepancy for cancelled service
body: I received an invoice for a service I already cancelled last month. Please investigate this discrepancy.

subject: Request for accidental double billing refund
body: Requesting a refund for the accidental double billing on my account from yesterday's transaction.

subject: Question regarding sales tax on receipt #5521
body: I have a question regarding the sales tax applied to my most recent receipt #5521. Is this correct?

subject: Enterprise plan renewal cost breakdown request
body: Can you provide a detailed breakdown of the upcoming renewal costs for our enterprise plan?

subject: Changing primary credit card for next cycle
body: Need to change the primary credit card on file for our monthly billing cycle starting next week.

subject: Invoice request for tax audit records
body: Would it be possible to get an invoice for last year's subscription for our tax audit records?

subject: Loyalty discount inquiry for upcoming upgrade
body: I am considering upgrading our plan next quarter and want to know about any available loyalty discounts.

subject: Wire transfer payment option confirmation
body: Just wanted to confirm if you accept wire transfers for the annual payments instead of credit cards.

subject: Production dashboard blank for all APAC users
body: The production dashboard is completely blank for all users in the APAC region. This is a P0 issue.

subject: App crashes on 'Finalize Report' button click
body: The application crashes every single time I try to click the 'Finalize Report' button. We can't work.

subject: Data missing after latest platform update
body: Data corruption detected: several entries from our database seem to have vanished after the last update.

subject: 500 Internal Server Error on large file upload
body: The file upload system returns a 500 Internal Server Error when processing files larger than 5MB.

subject: Search results not showing newly created items
body: Search results are not showing newly created items, causing confusion for our operations team.

subject: Delete action fails on user management page
body: The 'Delete' action on the user management page is not working, even when I have admin permissions.

subject: UI elements overlapping on mobile landscape view
body: The UI elements are overlapping on mobile devices when viewing the analytics chart in landscape mode.

subject: Grammatical error in new user welcome email
body: There is a grammatical error in the welcome email sent to new users, which looks unprofessional.

subject: Date sorting on activity page returning alpha results
body: Sorting by date on the activities page is not working correctly; it seems to be sorting alphabetically.

subject: Safari tooltip misalignment in settings
body: The tooltip on the settings icon is slightly misaligned by a few pixels on the Safari browser.

subject: Spelling mistake in documentation footer
body: A minor spelling mistake in the documentation's footer section needs to be corrected in the next release.

subject: Secondary button hover inconsistent
body: The hover effect on secondary buttons is inconsistent between the home page and the dashboard.

subject: Completely locked out - 2FA not sending codes
body: I'm completely locked out of my account and 2FA is not sending any codes to my registered phone.

subject: API integration failing across production envs
body: The API integration is failing with 'Connection Refused' across all our production environments today.

subject: Potential security vulnerability in search endpoint
body: Security vulnerability report: Found a potential SQL injection vulnerability in the search endpoint.

subject: Performance degradation: Dashboard loading > 30s
body: Performance degradation: It takes over 30 seconds to load the main dashboard page since this morning.

subject: SSO Okta login failing for all employees
body: The SSO login via Okta is failing with an invalid SAML token error for all our employees.

subject: Custom Webhook integration stopped receiving events
body: Our custom Webhook integration stopped receiving events from your platform about two hours ago.

subject: SMTP configuration for notification system
body: I need help configuring the SMTP settings for the automated notification system on our custom domain.

subject: OAuth2 support for newer REST API endpoints
body: Does your platform support OAuth2 authentication for the newer REST API endpoints we're building?

subject: API rate limiting differences between tiers
body: Can you explain the difference in rate limiting between the free tier and the professional tier APIs?

subject: Database export format specs for data lake
body: Looking for the technical specifications of your database export format for our internal data lake.

subject: Programmatic session token refresh inquiry
body: Is there a way to programmatically refresh the session token without a full user re-authentication?

subject: TLS version support for load balancer compliance
body: Requesting more details on the TLS versions supported by your load balancers for compliance reasons.

subject: Need CSV export for regulatory compliance audit tomorrow
body: We need a way to export data in CSV format by tomorrow morning for our regulatory compliance audit.

subject: GDPR 'Delete All' functionality immediate request
body: Our client requires a 'Delete All' functionality immediately to comply with new GDPR requests.

subject: Read-only role for upcoming security audit
body: The lack of a 'Read-only' role is a dealbreaker for our upcoming security audit next Tuesday.

subject: Dark mode support for late-night teams
body: Could you please add support for dark mode? Many of our users work late at night and it's a major pain point.

subject: Slack integration for real-time project updates
body: A Slack integration would be incredible for our team to keep track of real-time project updates.

subject: Bulk-editing tool for task management system
body: We desperately need a bulk-editing tool for the task management system to handle large project loads.

subject: Calendar view for project module deadlines
body: It would be very helpful to have a calendar view for the upcoming deadlines in the project module.

subject: Android mobile application availability
body: Are there any plans to add a mobile application for Android users? Our field team would love it.

subject: Dashboard widget customization for metrics
body: Could you add the ability to customize the dashboard widgets to show different performance metrics?

subject: Workspace theme background color options
body: It might be nice to change the background color of the workspace to several preset themes for personalization.

subject: Ability to favorite certain projects
body: A small feature to 'Favorite' certain projects for easier access would be a great quality-of-life add.

subject: Emoji support in comment section
body: Adding more emojis to the comment section would make the platform feel more modern and engaging.

subject: Suspicious unauthorized activity in our audit logs
body: I suspect our account has been compromised as I see unauthorized activity in the audit logs. Help!

subject: Missing legal agreement in portal portal
body: I cannot find our legal agreement anywhere in the portal. I need it for a meeting in 10 minutes.

subject: Inappropriate content removal on public board
body: A user is posting inappropriate content on our public board and I need to know how to ban them immediately.

subject: Confusing Smart Filter exclusionary results
body: I am not sure if I'm using the 'Smart Filter' correctly; it seems to exclude more results than expected.

subject: Differences between Archiving and Deleting projects
body: Could you explain the difference between 'Archiving' and 'Deleting' a project in more detail?

subject: Clarification on pricing tiers for small teams
body: Information about the new pricing tiers is confusing. Which one should a 10-person team choose?

subject: Training webinars for new administrators
body: Does the platform offer any training webinars or certification programs for new administrators?

subject: PDF user guide for offline support staff
body: How can I download the latest user guide in a PDF format for offline reading by our support staff?

subject: Best practices for organizing large folders
body: What are the best practices for organizing large folders with thousands of individual file entries?

subject: Mobile version roadmap inquiry
body: The recent update is interesting, but I'm curious about the long-term roadmap for the mobile version.

subject: Positive feedback on new dashboard design
body: Just wanted to say that the new dashboard looks great! Thanks to the design team for the improvement.

subject: Referral program for inviting colleagues
body: Is there a referral program where I can get some credits for inviting other colleagues to join?
